headline: Viking Global Opens Fresh Apple Stake Worth Nearly $1 Billion As Big Tech Trade Roars Back
summary: Viking Global revealed a new $912M Apple stake while adding Meta, Reddit and CoreWeave positions as hedge funds rotate back into Big Tech.
